description_long: This is a military jet aircraft with a sleek, streamlined fuselage painted in a combination of matte black, light blue-gray, and vivid orange accents on the nose, tail, and wing tips. The aircraft features a low-mounted, swept-back wing configuration and a single vertical stabilizer at the tail, both adorned with roundels and insignia. The cockpit is positioned forward on the fuselage and is enclosed with a clear canopy, likely designed for a single pilot. The landing gear is of the tricycle type, with the nose gear visible in the down position. Distinctive markings, including the number '60-44' and national insignia, are present on the fuselage and wings. The overall design suggests a classic jet fighter, with external fuel tanks or ordnance pylons mounted under the wings.
description: A military jet fighter with swept-back low wings, orange and blue-gray camouflage, and a forward enclosed cockpit. Markings and insignia are visible on the fuselage and wings.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the forward cockpit, swept wings, orange accents, and visible landing gear.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the tail section, single vertical stabilizer, and the symmetry of the swept-back wings with orange tips.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the other side's markings and the underwing attachments.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the nose, cockpit canopy, and the full span of the swept-back wings with visible underwing pylons.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, swept-back configuration with no visible winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single jet engine integrated in the fuselage, with no external nacelles visible.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with one nose gear and two main gear units, retractable.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a clear canopy.
